title: Zappl AppBar (com.zappl.AppBar)
description: AppBar is Zappl's companion Menu Bar app, developed by DARE Technology.

Title.title: Title
Title.description: The title text shown in the top left of the AppBar window

TitleFontSize.title: Title Font Size
TitleFontSize.description: The font size of the title text shown in the top left of the AppBar window. Accepts numerical values between 16 and 32. Values outside this range will default to 22

CustomLogo.title: Custom Logo
CustomLogo.description: The logo shown to the left of the title text. Can be a file path, URL to an image, or an SFSymbol name. Defaults to the 'Custom Logo (Dark Mode)' option if specified, or the 'app.badge.fill' SFSymbol if neither Custom Logo options are specified

CustomLogoDark.title: Custom Logo (Dark Mode)
CustomLogoDark.description: The logo shown to the left of the title text in dark mode. Can be a file path, URL to an image, or an SFSymbol name. Defaults to the 'Custom Logo' option if specified, or the 'app.badge.fill' SFSymbol if neither Custom Logo options are specified

NotificationIcon.title: Notification Logo
NotificationIcon.description: A path or URL to a custom branding logo shown to the right hand side of macOS notifications

MenuBarIcon.title: Menu Bar Icon
MenuBarIcon.description: Either a path to an icon (must be 16x16 points) or an SFSymbol name to be used as the menu bar icon. Defaults to the 'square.and.arrow.down.on.square' SFSymbol if not specified

AccentColor.title: Accent Colour
AccentColor.description: Custom colour to be used for buttons and highlighting. Accepts hex colour codes (e.g., #0000FF). Defaults to macOS system accent colour if not specified

InstallsTabEnabled.title: Installs Tab Enabled
InstallsTabEnabled.description: Determines whether the installs tab is enabled. Disabled by default. When disabled, users will see a message indicating installs are not allowed. When enabled, users can use the installs tab to install approved apps. To customise approved apps, use the 'Allowed Installs' or 'Excluded Installs' options in the com.dare.zappl.preferences configuration profile

HistoryTabEnabled.title: History Tab Enabled
HistoryTabEnabled.description: Determines whether the history tab is enabled. Uncheck to hide the history tab which shows recent updates, installs and failures

LiquidGlassEnabled.title: Liquid Glass Enabled
LiquidGlassEnabled.description: Enables the liquid glass effect on macOS 26 (Tahoe) and later. This option has no effect on macOS versions prior to macOS 26

AllowUpdateNotifications.title: Allow Update Notifications
AllowUpdateNotifications.description: Shows a macOS notification when new updates are cached by Zappl and are available to be updated via AppBar. Requires a notifications configuration profile which approves com.zappl.AppBar notifications

AllowInstallNotifications.title: Allow Install Notifications
AllowInstallNotifications.description: Shows a macOS notification when installs complete. Requires a notifications configuration profile which approves com.zappl.AppBar notifications

AllowFailureNotifications.title: Allow Failure Notifications
AllowFailureNotifications.description: Shows a macOS notification when installs or updates fail. Requires a notifications configuration profile which approves com.zappl.AppBar notifications

EnableQuitButton.title: Enable Quit Button
EnableQuitButton.description: Enables the quit button when right-clicking the menu bar icon. Uncheck to disable

EnableAboutButton.title: Enable About Button
EnableAboutButton.description: Enables the about button which shows AppBar information such as installed version when right-clicking the menu bar icon

identifier.title: App Identifier
identifier.description: The identifier of the application (e.g., com.example.app)

category.title: Category Label
category.description: The custom category label to assign to this app

CustomCategories.title: Custom Categories
CustomCategories.description: Customise the default categories apps are assigned to in the installs tab by specifying app identifiers and their desired custom category labels

identifier.title: App Identifier
identifier.description: The identifier of the application (e.g., com.example.app)

description.title: Description Text
description.description: The custom description to display for this app

CustomDescriptions.title: Custom Descriptions
CustomDescriptions.description: Customise the descriptions shown for apps in the installs tab by specifying app identifiers and their desired custom descriptions
